options.name: --workingDir
options.description:
Specify the path of the TwinCAT project directory.
Uses the current directory if not specified.

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Specify the timeout for the test-run in seconds.
Default: 120

options.name: --exclude-folder
options.description:
Specify the name of the test folder to exclude when
creating the artifact.
Can also be a path like Parent/Tests if the folder is
not in the plc root.
Default: Tests

options.name: --accept-all
options.description:
Accept all git branches.
By default, branch 'development' is expected.

options.name: --push
options.description: Push to remote repository after commit.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Don't create artifacts or make any changes.

options.name: --install
options.description:
Install the plc library after creation.
Default: True

options.name: --compiled
options.description: Save the library as a compiled-library artifact.

options.name: --force
options.description:
Force a new commit even if the current version has
been prepared already.
